```python
import sys

def shortest_palindrome(S):
    n = len(S)
    # Find the longest palindromic suffix
    max_len = 0
    for i in range(n):
        if S[i:] == S[i:][::-1]:
            max_len = n - i
            break
    # Add the reverse of the prefix to the front
    return S + S[:n - max_len][::-1]

def solve():
    S = sys.stdin.read().strip()
    print(shortest_palindrome(S))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    solve()
```
